message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first persist_captured_segment in ingest loop (tick 254)

Migrates the capture-ingest persist site in `frankenterm-core/runtime.rs`
to the cx-first sibling `persist_captured_segment_with_cx`:

- L47 import: add `persist_captured_segment_with_cx`, drop unused ambient
- L2850 call: `persist_captured_segment_with_cx(&persist_cx, &storage, ...)`
  where `persist_cx` resolves via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`

The `_with_cx` variant emits `cx.checkpoint()` before segment bounding
and threads cx through `record_gap_with_cx`, `append_segment_with_cx`,
and any internal `get_max_seq_with_cx` calls. This is the hottest storage
write path in the observation runtime — every captured delta/gap now
routes through cx-aware mpsc backpressure.

Production callers of ambient `persist_captured_segment` in runtime.rs
are fully migrated. The ambient fn itself is retained (body at L1500)
only for the ~15 sites in `ingest.rs` internal tests + 17 sites in
`tests/daemon_integration.rs`, which operate without Cx semantics as
pure storage correctness harnesses.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
(7 warnings, unchanged from baseline).

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 68 (187-254).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 9 (runtime.rs 7 + mcp.rs 2).
main.rs cross-crate total: 127 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
